q.en: Why did Hansel and Gretel's family have almost no food?
q.zh: 汉塞尔和格蕾特家为什么几乎没有食物？

options.en: A flood washed away their farm according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 洪水冲走了他们的农场（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: After three years of failed crops, only moldy potatoes were left
options.zh: 连续三年庄稼歉收，只剩发霉的土豆

explain.en: The book says: 'After three years of failed crops, Hansel and Gretel's family had no food left but some moldy potatoes.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“连续三年庄稼歉收后，汉塞尔和格蕾特家除了一些发霉的土豆外再无食物。”

q.en: In the glossary, what does 'wicked' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，“wicked”是什么意思？

options.en: Very sleepy according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 非常困倦（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines wicked as 'very mean or bad.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 wicked 定义为“非常刻薄或坏”。

q.en: What did Hansel use to mark a path home through the forest?
q.zh: 汉塞尔用什么在森林里标记回家的路？

options.en: Breadcrumbs dropped from a crust of bread
options.zh: 从一块面包上掰下的面包屑

options.en: Stones he carried in his pocket according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他口袋里装的石头（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Hansel 'decided to tear the bread into crumbs and drop them as he walked. He marked a path.'
explain.zh: 汉塞尔“决定把面包掰成碎屑，一边走一边撒下。他标记出了一条路。”

q.en: What ate Hansel's breadcrumbs so the children became lost?
q.zh: 是什么吃掉了汉塞尔的面包屑，让孩子们迷了路？

explain.en: 'Birds ate your crumbs—we're lost!' Gretel cried, after a sparrow 'grab a crumb, and fly off.'
explain.zh: 一只麻雀“叼起一块面包屑飞走了”后，格蕾特哭道：“鸟儿吃了你的面包屑——我们迷路了！”

q.en: How was the cottage in the forest different from a normal house?
q.zh: 森林里的小屋与普通房屋有什么不同？

options.en: It was made entirely of sweets and gingerbread
options.zh: 它完全是用糖果和姜饼做成的

options.en: It was floating on water according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它漂浮在水面上（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: 'In a meadow was the most remarkable thing—a cottage made entirely of sweets!'
explain.zh: “草地上有一件最不寻常的东西——一座完全用糖果做成的小屋！”

q.en: Why did Gretel give Hansel a chicken bone?
q.zh: 格蕾特为什么给汉塞尔一根鸡骨头？

options.en: So the witch would pinch the bone instead of his arm, thinking he wasn't getting fat
options.zh: 为了让女巫去捏骨头而不是他的胳膊，以为他没长胖

options.en: To feed him because he was hungry according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 因为他饿了，喂他吃（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Gretel whispered: 'When she tries to grab your arm, give her this instead,' so the witch pinched the bone and wondered 'Why aren't you getting fat?'
explain.zh: 格蕾特低声说：“她要抓你胳膊时，把这个给她。”于是女巫捏的是骨头，还纳闷“你怎么不长胖？”

q.en: How did the old woman trap Hansel?
q.zh: 老妇人是怎么困住汉塞尔的？

options.en: She fed him too much candy
She locked him in the cottage door according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她把他锁在小屋门里（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She tricked him into a birdcage and the door swung shut
options.zh: 她骗他进鸟笼，笼门“咔嗒”一声关上了

explain.en: Hansel climbed toward a latch 'He heard a click! as the cage door swung shut behind him.'
explain.zh: 汉塞尔爬向门闩时，“他听到‘咔嗒’一声！笼门在他身后关上了。”

q.en: What do Hansel and Gretel's actions in the story show about their characters?
q.zh: 汉塞尔和格蕾特在故事中的行为体现了他们怎样的性格？

options.en: They are lazy and give up easily according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们懒惰，容易放弃（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They are brave and clever, using tricks to escape
options.zh: 他们勇敢而聪明，用计谋逃了出去

options.en: They are afraid of the dark

explain.en: The Focus Question asks what you learn about their characters 'from what they say and do'; they trick the witch and free themselves.
explain.zh: 聚焦问题是让你从“他们说的话和做的事”中了解其性格；他们骗过女巫并自救。

q.en: How did the children finally escape from the witch?
q.zh: 孩子们最后是如何从女巫那里逃走的？

options.en: They ran while she was sleeping according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 趁她睡着时跑掉（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Gretel knocked the cage down with her broom and they shoved the witch inside it
options.zh: 格蕾特用扫帚打落鸟笼，他们把女巫塞进笼里

explain.en: Gretel 'swung her broom at the cage, knocking it from its hook... They shoved her into the cage and slammed the door.'
explain.zh: 格蕾特“抡起扫帚打向鸟笼，把它从钩子上打落……他们把她塞进笼子，砰地关上门。”

q.en: What did Hansel grab as the children fled into the forest?
q.zh: 孩子们逃进森林时，汉塞尔抓起了什么？

explain.en: 'Hansel snatched the treasure chest. Together, the children fled into the forest.' The treasure later buys food for the family.
explain.zh: “汉塞尔一把抓起宝箱。孩子们一起逃进了森林。”后来宝箱给家里换来了食物。

prompt.en: Imagine the birds had not eaten Hansel's breadcrumbs. Write a paragraph describing how the story would change.
prompt.zh: 假设鸟儿没有吃掉汉塞尔的面包屑。写一段话，描述故事会有怎样的不同。

en: Think about whether the children would have found their way home.
Consider what might have happened with the witch in the forest.
zh: 想一想孩子们是否能找到回家的路。
设想一下森林里的女巫情节可能会怎样发展。
